quickStats.criticalDesc: SKUs at or below safety stock with active stockout risk
quickStats.reorderDesc: SKUs between safety stock and reorder point that need a PO placed now
quickStats.totalSkusDesc: Total number of products being tracked and forecasted
quickStats.forecastAccuracyDesc: How closely EWMA velocity predictions match actual daily sales
quickStats.forecastAccuracyInsufficient: There is insufficient data to calculate forecast accuracy. Once more sales history is available, this will populate.

backfill.heading: Setting up StockSense for your store
backfill.description: We're importing your inventory and sales history so we can forecast accurate reorder points. This usually takes a minute or two.
backfill.failedDescription: Something went wrong while importing your sales history. Try again, or contact support if the problem continues.

welcome.heading: Welcome to StockSense
welcome.subtitle: Let's spend a minute setting up your forecasts so the numbers you see match how your store actually operates.

forecast.title: We forecast demand
forecast.description: Daily sales predictions for every variant, updated as new orders come in.

alert.title: We flag stockout risk
alert.description: Critical and reorder alerts before you run out, not after.

order.title: We tell you exactly how much to reorder
order.description: Statistical order quantities based on your lead time and service level.

preferences.heading: A few preferences
preferences.subtitle: These two values drive almost every forecast. You can change them later in Settings.

leadTime.label: Default lead time (days)
leadTime.help: How long a typical reorder takes to arrive from your supplier. Used as the default for every SKU until you set a per-product override.

serviceLevel.label: Target service level
serviceLevel.help: How often you want to avoid stockouts. Higher means more safety stock.

alerts.heading: Email alerts
alerts.description: Get notified when SKUs cross the critical or reorder threshold. You can change this later.
alerts.emailHelp: Address that will receive alert notifications.

preferences.saveError: Couldn't save your preferences. Try again in a moment.
preferences.importNote: We're already importing your last 180 days of orders in the background — this will continue while you set up.

syncing.subtitleRunning: We're importing your products, the last 180 days of orders, and computing your first forecasts. This usually takes a minute or two.
syncing.subtitleDone: Setup complete. Your forecasts are ready and we'll keep them up to date as new orders come in.
syncing.subtitleFailed: Something went wrong while importing your sales history. You can retry now or continue and we'll try again automatically.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.noCritical: No critical stock alerts right now.

settings.title: Configuration
settings.subtitle: Model parameters and sync settings
settings.reviewPeriodHelp: How often you plan to reorder. Drives the suggested order quantity on alerts.

emailAlerts.title: Email alerts
emailAlerts.description: Get notified by email when SKUs cross the critical or reorder threshold.
emailAlerts.emailHelp: Address that will receive alert notifications.

howItWorks.title: How StockSense Works
howItWorks.subtitle: StockSense uses statistical forecasting to predict when you'll run out of stock and how much buffer to keep. Here's every calculation behind the numbers you see.
